description: MCP server for StripFeed API. Convert any URL to clean, token-efficient Markdown for AI agents. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible client.
rules: Requires STRIPFEED_API_KEY environment variable (get one at https://www.stripfeed.dev/dashboard/keys)
Exposes three tools: fetch_url, batch_fetch, check_usage
fetch_url accepts: url (required), format, selector, model, cache, ttl, max_tokens
batch_fetch accepts: urls (array of 1-10 URLs), model
check_usage takes no parameters, returns plan/usage/limit/remaining
Authentication is via Bearer token in the STRIPFEED_API_KEY env var
